records.bridge_name: Source of the Nile Bridge (New Nile Bridge)

fields.comment: The point requires a modern secure conventional bridge with all bridge features built anew. Otherwise it is a risk for the class of road since heavier traffic do use the road. See photos
there is need to raise the bridge
The river is wide and shallow not a good site for the bridge Construction The drift is the convinient crossing but with more funding a bridge is possible and recommended
There is Scouring of the wearing surface concrete on the water course Attention for repair is required
